title: This NotebookLM feature cuts my workload by 50%
summary: NotebookLM's mind map feature automatically generates a visual overview of topics and subtopics from uploaded sources, enabling users to selectively focus on relevant content without manually reading all materials. The feature enables targeted chat interactions for extracting specific information aligned with user needs.
